requirement_topic.en: Electrical Safety — RCM Marking + EESS Registration
requirement_topic.zh: 电气安全——RCM标志 + EESS注册
requirement_topic.zht: 電氣安全——RCM標誌 + EESS登記

summary.en: The mandatory obligation is compliance with Australian electrical equipment safety laws in participating jurisdictions and the EESS rules before sale. Household refrigerators are in-scope electrical equipment when rated within the EESS voltage limits and designed or marketed for household, personal, or similar use. The responsible supplier must be an Australian or New Zealand legal entity, register on the EESS database, make a responsible supplier declaration, hold evidence that the equipment is electrically safe and meets the relevant standard, register Level 2 or Level 3 equipment where applicable, and mark compliant equipment with the Regulatory Compliance Mark (RCM). AS/NZS 60335.2.24 is the product-specific safety standard route for refrigerating appliances, read with AS/NZS 60335.1 and AS/NZS 3820 as applicable.
summary.zh: 强制性义务是在销售前符合澳大利亚参与辖区的电气设备安全法律及EESS规则。当家用电冰箱额定电压处于EESS范围内，并设计或宣传为家用、个人或类似用途时，属于范围内电气设备。责任供应商须为澳大利亚或新西兰法律实体，在EESS数据库注册，作出责任供应商声明，持有设备电气安全并符合相关标准的证据，在适用时注册2级或3级设备，并在合规设备上加贴RCM标志。AS/NZS 60335.2.24是制冷器具的产品专项安全标准路径，适用时与AS/NZS 60335.1和AS/NZS 3820结合使用。
summary.zht: 強制性義務是在銷售前符合澳洲參與轄區的電氣設備安全法律及EESS規則。當家用電冰箱額定電壓處於EESS範圍內，並設計或宣傳為家用、個人或類似用途時，屬於範圍內電氣設備。責任供應商須為澳洲或紐西蘭法律實體，在EESS資料庫登記，作出責任供應商聲明，持有設備電氣安全並符合相關標準的證據，在適用時登記2級或3級設備，並在合規設備上加貼RCM標誌。AS/NZS 60335.2.24是製冷器具的產品專項安全標準路徑，適用時與AS/NZS 60335.1和AS/NZS 3820結合使用。

standards_or_laws: Electrical Equipment Safety System (EESS) participating jurisdiction laws and Equipment Safety Rules — mandatory electrical safety and registration framework where applicable
AS/NZS 4417.1 and AS/NZS 4417.2 — RCM marking and equipment classification rules referenced by EESS
AS/NZS 60335.2.24 — Household and similar electrical appliances — Safety — Particular requirements for refrigerating appliances, ice-cream appliances and ice-makers (relevant standard route)
AS/NZS 60335.1 — General requirements; AS/NZS 3820 — Essential safety requirements for electrical equipment

summary.en: China's common domestic electrical safety route is CCC certification to GB 4706.13 and GB 4706.1 for household refrigerating appliances. CCC is mandatory for China domestic sale but is not an EESS responsible supplier registration, not an Australian equipment registration, and not permission to apply the RCM.
summary.zh: 中国境内常见电气安全路径为家用制冷器具依据GB 4706.13和GB 4706.1取得CCC认证。CCC对中国境内销售为强制性要求，但不是EESS责任供应商注册、不是澳大利亚设备注册，也不是加贴RCM的许可。
summary.zht: 中國境內常見電氣安全路徑為家用製冷器具依據GB 4706.13和GB 4706.1取得CCC認證。CCC對中國境內銷售為強制性要求，但不是EESS責任供應商登記、不是澳洲設備登記，也不是加貼RCM的許可。

standards_or_laws: GB 4706.13-2014 — Safety of household and similar electrical appliances — Particular requirements for refrigerating appliances, ice-cream appliances and ice-makers

gap.en: Chinese exporters need an Australian or New Zealand responsible supplier, EESS database registration, evidence to the relevant AS/NZS safety standard, RCM marking controls, and equipment registration if the refrigerator falls into Level 2 or Level 3. CCC certificates and GB reports may help engineering review, but they do not replace EESS declarations, the Australian/NZ responsible supplier role, or RCM marking authority.
gap.zh: 中国出口商需要澳大利亚或新西兰责任供应商、EESS数据库注册、符合相关AS/NZS安全标准的证据、RCM标志控制，以及在电冰箱属于2级或3级时完成设备注册。CCC证书和GB报告可辅助工程评审，但不能替代EESS声明、澳新责任供应商角色或RCM标志权限。
gap.zht: 中國出口商需要澳洲或紐西蘭責任供應商、EESS資料庫登記、符合相關AS/NZS安全標準的證據、RCM標誌控制，以及在電冰箱屬於2級或3級時完成設備登記。CCC證書和GB報告可輔助工程評審，但不能替代EESS聲明、澳紐責任供應商角色或RCM標誌權限。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory where EESS applies — responsible supplier registration, declaration, relevant-standard evidence, applicable equipment registration, and RCM marking are required by EESS participating jurisdiction rules; AS/NZS 60335.2.24 is the relevant refrigerator safety standard route, not itself the standalone market-access law
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — CCC certification to GB 4706.13/GB 4706.1 applies before sale in China

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] RCM/EESS compliance is not achieved by holding China CCC alone. The Australian supply chain needs the responsible supplier, EESS records, applicable registration level evidence, and controlled RCM marking before sale.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 仅持有中国CCC并不等于满足RCM/EESS。澳大利亚供应链在销售前需要责任供应商、EESS记录、适用等级的注册证据和受控RCM标志。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 僅持有中國CCC並不等於滿足RCM/EESS。澳洲供應鏈在銷售前需要責任供應商、EESS記錄、適用等級的登記證據和受控RCM標誌。
